Swapping lives with a guest for a day

situations.name: Memory Wipe
situations.prompt: You can erase one type of memory — rank which you'd erase first

cards.text: Every awkward thing you've ever said
Something you wish you never saw
The plot of your favorite show so you can watch it fresh
A regret that keeps you up at night
A lie you told that you still feel bad about
Something you found out about someone you wish you hadn't
A time you let someone down
An intrusive thought that never goes away
The ending to a movie so you can experience it again

situations.name: Groundhog Day
situations.prompt: You're reliving one type of day forever — rank which you'd pick

cards.text: A lazy Sunday with nowhere to be
The first warm day of spring
A holiday surrounded by people you love
A day at the beach with perfect waves
A snow day with hot chocolate and no responsibilities
Your birthday but the party never ends
A road trip day with the best playlist
A day exploring a city you've never been to
A rainy day with a book and nowhere to go
A camping night under the stars
A day where everything just goes right
Concert night for your favorite artist
A dinner party that goes until 3 AM
A workout where you feel unstoppable
A Friday afternoon with nothing left on your to-do list

situations.name: Accidentally Famous
situations.prompt: You went viral for something embarrassing — rank how you'd handle it

cards.text: Lean into it and make more content
Make a follow-up explaining what happened
Change your name on all platforms
Go on a podcast to tell your side
Turn it into a charity moment
Own it as your brand forever
Ask your most shameless friend for advice
Write a book about the experience

situations.name: Invisible for 24 Hours
situations.prompt: You're invisible for one day — rank what you'd do

cards.text: Sit in on a meeting about you
Ride a roller coaster without waiting in line
Explore a museum alone after hours
Find out what people really say about you
Travel first class on every flight
Walk through a city at night with zero fear
Sit in a courtroom and watch a trial
Just enjoy a day with no social expectations
Walk into any movie theater you want
Go to a sporting event from the best seat
Follow a stranger and see what their day is like
See if your pet acts different when you're not around

situations.name: Swap Lives With a Friend
situations.prompt: You're switching lives with someone for a week — rank what you'd try first

cards.text: Their job, just to see what it's like

situations.name: Apocalypse Bunker Design
situations.prompt: Building your apocalypse bunker — rank what goes in

cards.text: A comfortable bed and real pillows
A pet to keep you company
A ham radio to find survivors
A cooking setup that feels like home
A telescope or periscope to see outside

situations.name: Open a Restaurant
situations.prompt: You're opening a restaurant — rank what matters most

cards.text: A menu you're genuinely proud of
A vibe that makes people stay for hours
Affordable price so everyone can come
A drink menu that doesn't feel like an afterthought
A dessert that people come back specifically for
An open kitchen so people can see the cooking
A name that people can't forget
Regulars who feel like they belong

situations.name: Birthday Wishlist (Unlimited Budget)
situations.prompt: Money is no object for your birthday — rank what you'd ask for

cards.text: A trip anywhere in the world
A personal chef for a year
A surprise party with everyone you love
Front-row tickets to your dream event
A room in your house professionally redesigned
A spa day that lasts an entire weekend
A donation to a cause in your name
A year of any subscription you want
A private cooking class with a famous chef
A handwritten letter from everyone you know

situations.name: Snowed In for a Week
situations.prompt: You're snowed in at home for a week — rank what you need

cards.text: Enough snacks to last the siege
Good coffee and a French press
A puzzle that takes the whole week
Someone to be snowed in with
A window with a good view of the snow
Candles for when the power inevitably goes out
A bathrobe you never have to leave
Comfort food ingredients for soup and stew
Your pet curled up next to you

situations.name: One Last Road Trip
situations.prompt: One final road trip with your closest friends — rank what matters most

cards.text: No phones allowed in the car
Stopping at every weird roadside attraction
Sleeping under the stars at least one night
A deep 2 AM conversation at a gas station
Taking a wrong turn and finding something better
Everyone singing along to the same song
Spending a whole day at a place nobody's heard of
Gas station snacks at every stop
Watching the sunset from the road
Making a scrapbook or photo album of the trip

situations.name: You Win an Award
situations.prompt: You're winning a major award — rank what you'd want it to be for

cards.text: Being the best friend anyone could ask for
Writing a book that became a classic
Cooking the best meal anyone's ever tasted
Making people laugh for a living
Living the most interesting life possible

situations.name: Shrunk to 6 Inches Tall
situations.prompt: You're suddenly six inches tall — rank your biggest concern

cards.text: Not being able to reach the fridge
Not being able to drive anywhere
Getting sucked into a vacuum cleaner
A piece of toast being the size of a mattress
Having to climb stairs like mountains
Using your phone with your whole body

situations.name: Personal Theme Song
situations.prompt: Your life gets a theme song — rank what genre you'd pick

cards.text: Indie folk with an acoustic guitar
EDM drop when you walk in

situations.name: One Rule Everyone Must Follow
situations.prompt: You can impose one rule on everyone — rank which you'd choose

cards.text: No phones at the dinner table
Everyone has to try something new every month
You must let people merge in traffic
Everyone takes one day a week fully off
Wave thank-you when someone lets you in
Hold the door for people behind you
Read at least one book a month
Reply within 24 hours or say why you can't
Clean up after yourself in shared spaces

situations.name: Rewrite Your Childhood
situations.prompt: Rank how much you value each of these childhood experiences

cards.text: Learning an instrument from a young age
Having a sibling you're close with
Getting into cooking or baking early
Having a mentor who really believed in you
Being less afraid to try and fail
Having a creative outlet from the start
Staying in touch with childhood friends

situations.name: 24 Hours Left Online
situations.prompt: The internet shuts down forever tomorrow — rank what you'd do first

cards.text: Download every photo you've ever posted
Message everyone you've been meaning to reach out to
Print out directions to everywhere you go
Save every important document and file
Watch one last YouTube rabbit hole
Buy physical copies of your favorite books
Tell people your phone number since you can't DM anymore
Learn how to actually use a paper map
